intro: Xeraea decipiens, also known as X. decipiens, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly referred to as a shrubby plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of X. decipiens include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities. Herbal preparations made from X. decipiens include teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat various gastrointestinal issues and other health conditions.
